name: Shamrock Chocolate Cream Cheese Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 Packaged crumb crust (6 oz.) or homemade 9-inch graham cracker crumb crust
recipeInstructions: Heat oven to 350°F. In a large bowl, beat the cream cheese, sugar, vanilla and peppermint extract (if desired) until well blended. Add cocoa; beat until well blended, scraping sides of the bowl and beaters frequently. Add eggs; beat well. Stir in whipping cream. Pour into crust. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes. The center will be soft but will set upon cooling. Cool to room temperature. Cover; refrigerate several hours or overnight. Garnish with whipped topping and chocolate curls, if desired. Cover; refrigerate leftover pie. Makes 6 to 8 servings.
